scripts.build: echo 'No build step needed - using static files'
scripts.build:ios: echo 'iOS builds via GitHub Actions - push to trigger'
scripts.cap:sync: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec capacitor-dev npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:android: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec capacitor-dev npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:ios: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec capacitor-dev npx cap sync ios
